markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the content strategy and SEO plan for Swoogo's website and blog.](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has set up a content pipeline and calendar in Airtable to track content pieces at different stages](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [They analyzed Swoogo's search console data, ad keywords, and ICPs to identify relevant topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Initial focus will be on lower difficulty keywords with decent search volume to drive traffic](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Swoogo to provide additional data on high-converting keywords and product roadmap to refine the strategy](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Plan to start with 3 calibration articles this week, then 10 articles per week going forward](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline and Airtable Setup

  - [GrowthX has set up an Airtable to manage the content pipeline and calendar](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [All content pieces will be tracked here at different statuses (working, published etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [The setup is based on Swoogo's search console data, ad keywords, ICPs, and target industries](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)

### Keyword Research and Topic Clusters

  - [Initial set of 25-30 topic clusters identified based on Swoogo's ad data and ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Clusters cover areas like event registration, management, trade shows, webinars etc.](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [More clusters can be added based on Swoogo's inputs on product roadmap, high-intent keywords etc.](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [The difficulty level of keywords will be considered to prioritize lower-hanging fruit initially](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

### Collaboration and Data Sharing

  - [Swoogo to share additional data on high-converting keywords from Salesforce for better prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Mitch (Demand Gen Manager) to collaborate closely and share paid keyword/pipeline data](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Stacey to share upcoming product briefing deck once approved for better content planning](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)

### Content Production Plan

  - [3 calibration articles to be published by end of this week](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [10 articles per week starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Performance data from Search Console will be analyzed to optimize content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [WordPress access and publishing process to be discussed separately](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Swoogo to provide high-converting keyword data from Salesforce](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Swoogo to share product roadmap/briefing once approved](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [Set up separate session to discuss WordPress publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [GrowthX to publish 3 calibration articles by week-end](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Continue discussions on refining content clusters and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/jZ-FzVWaRR7EAc3j4-82hZjn8AXeUPfL?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
